summary: Use the lower of your Weapon Skill Bonus

mechanics.name_guess: Use the lower of your Weapon Skill Bonus
mechanics.breadcrumb_path: Rules Compendium > Page 103 > history > Use the lower of your Weapon Skill Bonus
mechanics.excerpt: Use the lower of your Weapon Skill Bonus or the Martia Arts Skill Bonus for that maneuver to resolve the attack LEADERSHIP The Leadership Skill is used to direct and command others in jobs or military operations.
